title: Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean

seo.title: Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Recipe - Easy & Cheesy!
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make delicious Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread at home! This viral recipe features sweet cream cheese and savory garlic butter. Get the easy step-by-step guide.

seo.h1: Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Recipe

Pro Tips for the Best Results
seo.imageAlt: A freshly baked loaf of Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread, sliced to show the creamy filling and golden crust.
seo.imageCaption: Indulge in the viral sensation: homemade Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread, a perfect blend of sweet and savory.

description: Experience the viral sensation of Korean Cream Cheese Garlic Bread, a delightful fusion of sweet and savory flavors. Soft, airy bread rolls are generously filled with a luscious cream cheese mixture and then soaked in an aromatic garlic butter bath. This beloved street food snack offers an irresistible balance that will tantalize your taste buds with every bite.

ingredients.item: Soft bread rolls or brioche buns

instructions.title: Prepare the Cream Cheese Filling
instructions.text: In a medium bowl, combine the softened cream cheese, 3 tablespoons of granulated sugar, and 2 tablespoons of heavy cream or milk. Mix with a whisk or spatula until the mixture is smooth, creamy, and lump-free. Set aside.

instructions.title: Prepare the Garlic Butter Dip
instructions.text: In another bowl, combine the melted unsalted butter, minced garlic, 2 tablespoons of granulated sugar, and dried parsley flakes. If using, whisk in the egg yolk for a richer color and shine. Stir well to combine all ingredients.

instructions.title: Cut the Bread Rolls
instructions.text: Take each bread roll and make 6-8 deep cuts, starting from the top center and going outwards, without cutting all the way through the bottom. The cuts should resemble a flower or star pattern, creating pockets for the filling.

instructions.title: Fill the Bread Rolls
instructions.text: Carefully open the cuts in each bread roll and generously pipe or spoon the cream cheese filling into each crevice. Ensure the filling is evenly distributed throughout the bread.

instructions.title: Dip and Coat the Bread
instructions.text: Preheat your oven to 180°C (350°F). Gently pick up each filled bread roll and fully immerse it into the garlic butter mixture. Ensure all sides and crevices are thoroughly coated with the garlic butter. You can also use a brush to coat if dipping is too messy.

instructions.title: Bake to Golden Perfection
instructions.text: Place the coated bread rolls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and the cream cheese filling is warm and slightly bubbly. Serve immediately and enjoy the irresistible aroma and taste!

tips: For an extra fluffy texture, slightly warm your bread rolls in the microwave for 10-15 seconds before cutting and filling.
If you don't have a piping bag, use a small spoon to carefully push the cream cheese filling into the bread crevices.
This bread is best enjoyed warm and fresh from the oven. If you have leftovers, reheat briefly in a toaster oven or microwave.
article: Cream Cheese Garlic Bread Korean is a beloved Korean Baking dish enjoyed across Korean. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
